changes.description: Added segment identity tokens (--segment-intro through --segment-survivor), spacing scale (--space-1 through --space-8), radius scale (--radius-md through --radius-2xl), animation duration tokens (--duration-micro through --duration-zoom), and easing function tokens (--ease-out, --ease-breathe, --ease-organic)
Added segment colors to @theme inline block for Tailwind utility class generation (bg-segment-feud, etc.)

notes: Production build has pre-existing @utility nesting error unrelated to token additions. Tests pass.
